title: Notifications - Onboarding - Allow, UI
scenario: Verify that after allowing notifications during onboarding, the Notification settings screen shows a master toggle set to ON and allows individual notification toggles to be changed.
steps: 1. Launch the app and proceed through the onboarding flow.
3. Navigate to the Notification settings screen.
4. Observe the master toggle for notifications.
5. Attempt to change individual notification toggles.
expected: The Notification settings screen shows a master toggle set to ON and allows individual notification toggles to be changed.
